---
title: "nottem_pr1"
author: "Raahat"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---
```{r}
library(datasets)
data("nottem")

# Display first few observations
head(nottem)

# Decompose the time series
nottem_decomp <- decompose(nottem)

# Plot decomposition
plot(nottem_decomp, col = "pink", lwd = 2)

# Display components
nottem_decomp$trend
nottem_decomp$seasonal
nottem_decomp$random
```
